name: grok-acp
description: Thin ACP stdio dispatcher for Grok CLI tasks.

scripts.smoke: node ./bin/grok-acp.mjs run --prompt-text "用一句中文回复：grokACP smoke ok。" --cwd /home/desk/dev/repos/zq --out-dir ./.runs --timeout-ms 60000 --quiet
scripts.smoke:write: rm -f /tmp/grok-acp-write-smoke.txt && node ./bin/grok-acp.mjs run --prompt-text "请创建或覆盖 /tmp/grok-acp-write-smoke.txt，内容只写 grok-acp-write-ok，然后回复 done。" --cwd /home/desk/dev/repos/zq --out-dir /tmp/grok-acp-runs --timeout-ms 120000 --quiet && test "$(cat /tmp/grok-acp-write-smoke.txt)" = "grok-acp-write-ok"
scripts.lint: node --check ./bin/grok-acp.mjs && node --check ./src/acp-client.mjs && node --check ./src/cli.mjs && node --check ./src/config.mjs && node --check ./src/dispatch-recorded.mjs && node --check ./src/paths.mjs && node --check ./src/report.mjs && node --check ./src/session-store.mjs && node --check ./src/task-recorder.mjs && node --check ./src/monitor-throughput.mjs && node --check ./src/monitor-task-index.mjs && node --check ./src/monitor-routes.mjs && node --check ./src/monitor-server.mjs && node --check ./tools/dev-fake-task.mjs && node --check ./tools/test-monitor.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:ui
scripts.ui:build: npm --prefix ui install && npm --prefix ui run build
